message: It was morning. I could tell from the birdsong outside and the light that was streaming through the gap in the curtains.

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... I couldn't sleep after hearing Tsukasa say something like that."
Two nights in a row without any sleep.
What did she mean by "love"? Jeez, we're both girls.
But...

name: Yuki
message: "For some reason, my heart's kind of fluttering."
I really couldn't understand this feeling.
Normally I would have felt shocked and uncomfortable, but...
But it didn't feel unpleasant at all.
If I had to say, the phrase that would best describe this feeling...
The closest fit was to say my heart was "aflutter."
Why was my heart fluttering like this?

name: Yuki
message: "I don't get it at all."
Jeez, how did things end up like this anyway?
At first, it was just Takashima-san who was going to stay here while she was searching for the sky. Then Kagami and Tsukasa ended up staying here too.
It didn't make any sense. How did it turn out like that?
Besides that...
That's right. At first, she wanted to stay here so she could look for the sky. Why were we just laying around like this?
To get rid of this feeling, I needed to go find whatever Takashima-san was looking for as soon as possible, send her home, and then get rid of Tsukasa and Kagami too.
If this kept up...
Something weird could happen.

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha. It feels like the way things are headed is a bit dangerous. Like it'll lead to a strange situation."

name: Tsukasa
message: "What's dangerous?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?! Tsukasa."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Wh-Why are you so surprised?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, uh, well... Nothing."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Your face doesn't look like it's nothing, though."

name: Yuki
message: "Th-That's because you were saying weird things last night."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Weird things?"

name: Yuki
message: "You were talking about love and all that."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Is that weird? Well, now that you mention it, maybe it is."

name: Kagami
message: "That doesn't matter. Hurry up, we're gonna be late for school."

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa, you're right. I have to get ready!"
We skipped yesterday, but today we went to school.
As always, there was nothing to do but sit around idly and wait for class to end. But for some reason, the school day didn't feel very long at all.
Summer break was almost here. I just had to endure this boredom for a little longer.
The four of us walked home together.
It felt like we hadn't walked together like that in a long time.
Well, we were all going to the same place, so maybe it was inevitable that we would walk home together.

name: Yuki
message: "We need to stop screwing around. We should go sky-searching today."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. Yesterday, we skipped that too."

name: Kagami
message: "By sky-searching, you mean searching for the Summer Triangle?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, there was something about the world-class girl meeting the astronaut, or something like that."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I don't think that's right, Yuki."

name: Kagami
message: "Where are we going to go search?"

name: Yuki
message: "There's a building in Suginomiya where we were planning on going, but..."

name: Kagami
message: "Yuki, have you ever heard of light pollution?"

name: Yuki
message: "Of course I have. Astronomy and things like that are impossible if there's too much light, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "But what's the use in trying to find a spot in Tokyo without any light? Besides, even here in Tokyo, we should at least be able to spot the Summer Triangle."

name: Kagami
message: "But still, you shouldn't pick the part of the city with the most lights. Suginomiya is right in the middle of the shopping district."

name: Yuki
message: "But are there any rooftops we can get to in the parts of the city with less light? There's no point if we can't get on the roof."

name: Kagami
message: "Why don't you talk to the Astronomy Club?"

name: Yuki
message: "Astronomy Club?"

name: Kagami
message: "The Astronomy Club. They can use the school roof at night if they get permission ahead of time."

name: Yuki
message: "Really?"

name: Kagami
message: "Of course, it's a pain filling out the paperwork to be allowed up there in the middle of the night, but it shouldn't be a problem going just a couple hours after the sun sets."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Can you see the stars well from there?"

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah. The school is built on high ground, and it's surrounded by forest. Especially Building C, since its roof is the highest."

name: Zakuro
message: "Did you say... Building C?"
Takashima-san's expression suddenly clouded over as she mumbled that.

name: Yuki
message: "What's wrong? You looked pretty grim when she said 'Building C.'"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, no. It's nothing. Excuse me."

name: Zakuro
message: "But I do think that would be the best place, since it's the highest place in the school. I've been there quite a few times before."

name: Yuki
message: "Have you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I was in the Art Club. The only way to get to the roof of Building C is through the art room, so we used to go up there a lot."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh. You're not in that club anymore?"

name: Zakuro
message: "There was a little accident, so the club doesn't operate anymore."

name: Yuki
message: "The Art Club had an accident?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Well, I don't think that's what really matters here. We were talking about the school roof."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I don't hang around the school at night very often, but you're right, it does seem like it would get pretty dark at night."

name: Kagami
message: "It might be a problem trying to look at the eastern side of the sky, since there would be too many lights, but we should be able to see the Summer Triangle pretty clearly after eight o'clock or so."

name: Yuki
message: "Speaking of which, why do you know so much about astronomy?"

name: Kagami
message: "One of the girls from our class, Miu, is in the Astronomy Club."

name: Yuki
message: "Miu-san? Now that you mention it, I might've heard that name before."

name: Kagami
message: "You really don't remember your own classmates, do you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yuki-sama can't remember people's faces or names. She didn't remember me either."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Really? I think I can remember people fine. I remembered you after the first time we met on the rooftop."

name: Zakuro
message: "You're the only one who thinks that. It's not a big deal, though."
The way she said that.. It was like she was saying we'd met before. Actually, thinking back on it, she did say, "Thank you for lending me another book," or something like that.
Which would mean that we already knew each other, at least well enough to be lending each other books. I didn't remember that at all, though.

name: Kagami
message: "Yuki, you should try to remember people better. Who's gonna want to be friends with you if you can't even remember their name?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well... Yeah, I'll try."

name: Kagami
message: "Anyway, I'll call Miu and ask her. We'll probably be able to use the roof tomorrow, or at worst the day after."

name: Yuki
message: "Then what should we do for today?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Want to try going to the building you were talking about earlier?"

name: Zakuro
message: "No. In that case, we should just go home. I have some important news."

name: Yuki
message: "Important?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "That's right. There's something very important today."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Really?"
I wondered what they meant by "something important."
Whatever they were talking about, it felt like something was up.
By the time we got home, the sun had set.
Takashima-san and Tsukasa started making dinner right away.
It looked like those two would be the ones making dinner tonight.
I didn't think Tsukasa was any good at cooking, though.
Putting that aside, what did they mean by "something important"?
That was what I was worried about, but the two of them just started making dinner as if they had forgotten about it.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Dinner's ready!"

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa, that was fast!"

name: Kagami
message: "And this... is dinner?"
They laid out crackers, cheese, potato chips, and pizza (probably leftovers). Though I guess they probably made these fries. If I had to describe it...

name: Zakuro
message: "That's right. Um, I have an important announcement."

name: Yuki
message: "An important announcement?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Anyway, it's not fancy, but I got this box and made lots."

name: Yuki
message: "Lots? We're going to draw lots to determine our roles, right?"

name: Kagami
message: "We're just going stargazing. What roles could there be for that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "No, these aren't roles for stargazing."

name: Yuki
message: "Then what roles are they?"

name: Kagami
message: "Actually, I do remember you talking last night about how important the division of labor is."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. The world is divided into those who rule and those who are ruled. The people who stand above and the people who toil below."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Well, I guess that is pretty important."

name: Kagami
message: "Hey, how can you be convinced so easily?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Kagami-san is right. The light pollution would be a problem in Suginomiya. I don't think we would accomplish anything there. There might not be any point in going today."

name: Kagami
message: "What does that have to do with the rulers and the ruled?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "We're going to determine who's King tonight!"

name: Kagami
message: "Huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. That's exactly it. This night is ours, so we should enjoy it. It won't take that long to find what I'm searching for."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Well then, let the King Game begin!"

name: Yuki
message: "King? King Game?! What does that have to do with stargazing?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Here we go!"
She shook the box.
Something else was still bothering me.

name: Yuki
message: "Um, Takashima-san, you said it wouldn't take very long?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, I did."

name: Yuki
message: "How do you know that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I can't say for sure. It's just an optimistic view. With this many people searching, it shouldn't take that long. That's what I was thinking."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, okay."
Optimistic, huh? Well, okay, I guess.
After all, it's not like a real beginning and end to the sky ever existed.
Why did she think you could find something like that so easily?
Where the girl of the sky meets the girl who is the world itself. The beginning of the sky and the end of the sky.
I couldn't even imagine a place like that existing.
So why was I helping Zakuro search for it?

name: Tsukasa
message: "Let's get started! I always dreamed of sitting around, eating junk food, and playing games with you guys."

name: Kagami
message: "So this was your idea, Tsukasa."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah, we never do anything like this in our house. If we're going to have a slumber party, this is what we have to do."

name: Zakuro
message: "We have plenty of drinks too."
What the heck? This was "something important"?
Jeez, Tsukasa and Takashima-san were...

name: Tsukasa+Zakuro
message: "Who is the K-I-N-G?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Come on, you two have to say it too."

name: Kagami
message: "Um, I don't know how to play this game."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Just say, 'Who is the K-I-N-G?' and draw a lot. Then whoever the king is gives an order to one of the numbers, and whoever drew that number has to do what the king says."

name: Kagami
message: "Really? Th-That's a bit scary."

name: Tsukasa
message: "So you don't want to give any really unfair orders. If everyone keeps giving orders like that, it just gets worse and worse as it escalates."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Well, it's definitely something people would do at a party, but we're all girls, so nothing that bad's gonna happen."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Well then, let's go."

name: Everyone
message: "Who is the K-I-N-G?"
We all said that and drew our lots.

name: Kagami
message: "Oh... Mine says 'King.'"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Kagami-sama has been crowned King."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Well then, what command do you want to give to what number?"

name: Yuki
message: "Please, God, don't let her choose me. I beg of you."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuki, that's the death penalty! To the guillotine with you! We'll put your head on a pike!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?! What's this all of a sudden, and why a pike?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "If you talk about the king like that, you'll be put to death instantly for lese-majeste."

name: Yuki
message: "What does that have to do with the King Game?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "What should I do with this foolish peasant, your majesty?"

name: Kagami
message: "Let's see. Well, if she apologizes, I suppose I could deign to forgive her."

name: Tsukasa
message: "That's far too lenient, my lord!"

name: Kagami
message: "Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "You must be kingly and say, 'My word is law. My deeds are law. I shall not allow anyone in this world to defy me, even should I defy everyone in it.' Without that resolve, you won't be able to unite the Three Kingdoms."

name: Yuki
message: "This isn't the Three Kingdoms Period, and besides, there are four of us."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Stay your tongue!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "With that attitude, you'll amount to nothing in the coming age."

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-What are you talking about?"

name: Zakuro
message: "That's right. We don't know who's going to be the next king."

name: Kagami
message: "N-Now that you mention it, I might not have another chance, and I can make Yuki do anything I want. Hehehe."

name: Yuki
message: "Th-That smile is kind of creepy, Kagami."
Did she have some kind of grudge against me? I was kind of worried what she was going to make me do.

name: Kagami
message: "Heheh. I hope you're ready."

name: Kagami
message: "A-Ahem. Well then, Yuki."

name: Kagami
message: "G-Give me a compliment."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? What? That's all? That is a bit embarrassing, but..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "She has proffered an armistice. She wishes to cease this bloodshed and live in peace. Can ye not even understand that much?"

name: Yuki
message: "You can stop with the Three Kingdoms act. And that's not even really Three Kingdoms stuff. Those lines are actually all from Yokoyama *****teru's version."

name: Tsukasa
message: "But still, you're always fighting with her. It wouldn't hurt to give her a compliment once in a while, would it?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm... Well, a compliment, you say?"
I looked straight at Kagami.

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm... A compliment, you say, but I don't really know what to compliment."

name: Kagami
message: "Tsukasa, off with her head!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Abracadabra!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ts-Tsukasa!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "No, your line is 'Guan Yu, how could you?'"

name: Yuki
message: "I get it, you like the Romance of the Three Kingdoms."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I love it. It's great, isn't it? If you say 'King Game,' that's the first thing that comes to mind, isn't it?"
I was pretty sure that wasn't the first thing that would come to anyone's mind.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuki, what's your OTP? It's gotta be Zhou Yu and Zhuge Liang. The Romance of the Three Kingdoms was the historical record of their blossoming love."

name: Yuki
message: "Of course not. You can't just make up stories about people that actually existed."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I'm not making it up. I mean, Fa-sama even said so."

name: Yuki
message: "And who's Fa-sama?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Fa-sama is Fa-sama... hic."
Hic?
Huh?
I was wondering, but...

name: Yuki
message: "Tsukasa, isn't your face a bit flushed?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "I'm fine. I can hold my drink."
Hold her drink?
Wait! She couldn't be...
I checked my drink.
And...

name: Yuki
message: "This is alcohol, isn't it?!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hehehe. You need beer to play the King Game."

name: Kagami
message: "Well then..."
Kagami stood in front of me. Her cheeks were flushed as well.
When I looked her in the eyes, her gaze was unsteady.

name: Yuki
message: "Wait, why do you have a knife? W-Wait a second!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Go ahead and say it."

name: Yuki
message: "Urgh."

name: Tsukasa
message: "What do you mean, 'urgh'?"
I don't know what's going on, but these two are definitely a bit tipsy. Um, maybe I should try not to upset them too much.

name: Yuki
message: "O-Okay..."

name: Yuki
message: "Um, let's see. Um..."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, well, well... You see, hmm... Well..."

name: Kagami
message: "Why the hesitation? Is it so hard to think of anything to compliment about me on?"

name: Kagami
message: "She's starting to get on my nerves. Tsukasa, maybe we really should take off her head."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, I'm joking. That was a joke. I'll say one, right now, yeah."

name: Yuki
message: "Um... yeah, um... Well, you see... Uhhhh... Um, that, that thing, uh... Right, like, uh..."

name: Kagami
message: "Tsukasa, could you hold her down? I don't think I'll be able to get all the way through with one swing."

name: Yuki
message: "I-I think you're cute, Kagami. You have a nice figure, you stay in shape, and you're really smart, yeah!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Huh? Wh-Why are you glaring at me? I complimented you, didn't I?"

name: Kagami
message: "No, for some reason, hearing you say that bugs me. It's like you didn't really mean it."

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-What do you want me to say, then?"

name: Zakuro
message: "This isn't how the King Game should work. You have to say a number before giving a command."

name: Kagami
message: "I-I guess so... I guess that is what the rules were. Well then, number one, do twenty sit-ups."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ooh... Looks like I dug my own grave."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Takashima-san, you're number one?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, unfortunately."

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm not very strong, but if it's the king's order, I guess I have to."
She laid on the ground and started doing sit-ups.

name: Zakuro
message: "Hmm... ah... One... haa... Two."
Her movements put pressure on her chest, emphasizing her plentiful bust.

name: Zakuro
message: "Mm... haaa... Th... ree."
Her breath was ragged. As she'd said, she wasn't very strong.
Could she really do twenty of them?
And...

name: Zakuro
message: "Haa, hhmm... Four."
Her breasts were jiggling...
She really is well endowed, isn't she?

name: Zakuro
message: "D-Don't worry about me. Go ahead and start the next round. I'll take the one that's left over."

name: Kagami
message: "Maybe we could lower the number?"

name: Zakuro
message: "No. We have to play by the rules."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Takashima-san, don't push yourself too hard."

name: Zakuro
message: "Thank you."

name: Yuki
message: "Uh, well then..."
We mixed up the lots again.

name: Everyone
message: "Who is the K-I-N-G?"
We all drew our lots.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ah! I'm the king!"

name: Kagami
message: "Tsukasa's the king."

name: Tsukasa
message: "At ease, my subjects."

name: Kagami
message: "What order do you give, and to whom, your majesty?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "First, deploy the troops along the southern shore. Next, feign concession so you can approach, and then have Huang Gai torch Cao Cao's ships."

name: Yuki
message: "Three Kingdoms again!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan, to the guillotine with her!"

name: Yuki
message: "Again with the guillotine?!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Come on, Yuki. That was an official decree of the Wu clan. Don't ruin the mood."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm pretty sure that was actually Zhou Yu. And he wasn't a king."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I love Zhou Yu!"
Tsukasa's face was pure red, but she looked like she was having fun.
I had to wonder if she should be drinking.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh, well... Let's see... Number two, twenty push-ups!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Two more... Haa, ha... Nineteen!"

name: Kagami
message: "You can do it, Takashima-san. One more!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Haa... Hmmhaa, Twenty."

name: Yuki
message: "Good work!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Haa, haa... Thank you. Well then, my number is..."
Takashima flipped over her own lot.

name: Kagami
message: "My condolences."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha. Maybe I should change the order."

name: Zakuro
message: "No. Then we couldn't call it the King Game. It's called the King Game because we have to obey the order no matter what it might be."

name: Zakuro
message: "So I'll do the pushups... One."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Let's at least change the number."

name: Zakuro
message: "No. The rules are absolute. We can't change them now. Please, keep playing."

name: Kagami
message: "All right. Then..."
We mixed up the lots again.

name: Everyone
message: "Who is the K-I-N-G?"
We each picked our lots.

name: Kagami
message: "N-No way."

name: Zakuro
message: "Exactly. I was waiting for this."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Takashima-san is the king?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I am the god of the New World Order! Mmph, four."

name: Yuki
message: "You're not a god. And you should finish your push-ups before declaring a new world order."

name: Zakuro
message: "I'll be finished in just a moment..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Haa, haa, haa..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "U-Um, Takashima-san, are you okay?"

name: Zakuro
message: "D-Don't worry about me. I have carried out your orders... Haa, haa..."
It must have been pretty tough doing all those sit-ups and push-ups, especially considering the effects of the alcohol. We waited a while for her to get her breath back.
When she got her breath back, her eyes still looked a bit glazed.

name: Zakuro
message: "Let's see... Number three!"
She yelled that and looked at our faces. Apparently, her strategy was to guess whose number she had called based on our reactions.
But no one would fall for...

name: Tsukasa
message: "Wha-Wha-Whaa..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, it's Tsukasa-san?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yes... I'm number three."

name: Zakuro
message: "You were kind to me, so... hic."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahahaha..."

name: Zakuro
message: "I'll let you off easy. Get naked."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?!"

name: Kagami
message: "Guh?!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Uwaaah!"
Th-That was a really rough one.
Wasn't that the kind of order that usually happened in the last stages of the game?
Though it probably did seem like the last stage to her after she drank that much and we made her do all those exercises.
But still, why naked?

name: Zakuro
message: "Hic... Um, can't you do it? It's fine if you can't do it... It's just a game, after all... Hehe."
Hey, you were the one that insisted we had to follow the orders no matter what!

name: Tsukasa
message: "O-Of course I can do it!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "As a general, it's my duty to live on and become the next king, even if it means bearing this shame!"
What was she even talking about?

name: Kagami
message: "U-Um, Tsukasa..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "B-Besides, w-we're all girls! There's nothing to be embarrassed about!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "But when I'm crowned as king, I'll make you do something even worse!"
The King Game was pointlessly escalating. I wondered if Tsukasa was serious about that.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Th-There, I did it."

name: Kagami
message: "Uh, maybe we should use the three second rule, or something like that?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "I-I don't need that. Come on, start the next round."
Tsukasa's face was red and streaked with tears. If it was that embarrassing, she didn't have to go that far. Takashima-san even said she didn't have to do it.

name: Yuki
message: "Um, Tsukasa..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I-I'm not embarrassed! Start the next round!"

It was true that we were all the same sex, and we wouldn't care if we were at a bath house or someplace where we were all naked. It just felt weird because we were in the living room and she was the only one naked.
And it didn't help that Tsukasa herself was so clearly embarrassed. It was kind of making the rest of us feel embarrassed too.
Tsukasa's face was so red that it seemed like steam was about to billow out of her ears. She was huddled on the floor, trying to hide her shame.
We mixed up the lots again.

name: Everyone
message: "Who is the K-I-N-G?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Uwooah, I got it! I'm the king!"

name: Yuki
message: "Th-That's amazing. I guess your tenacity paid off."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hehehe... Now it's my turn."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Number two!"
King Tsukasa yelled out a number and looked at our faces... No one fell for it.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hmm? Why are you looking away, Takashima-san?"

name: Zakuro
message: "B-Because..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Number two, take off all your clothes!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Heheheh..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Huh?"

name: Kagami
message: "Number two... is me, Tsukasa."

name: Tsukasa
message: "One of Zhuge Liang's traps!"

name: Yuki
message: "No, that trap was obvious."

name: Tsukasa
message: "After that, off with Yuki's head."

name: Yuki
message: "That has nothing to do with the King Game!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Um, Onee-chan..."

name: Kagami
message: "Ugh... Whatever, we won't be able to get revenge if we change the rules now."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan..."

name: Kagami
message: "I won't let you off with just stripping. We'll show you the power of the twins working together."
But you two weren't working together at all. That's why you fell into that trap.

name: Zakuro
message: "We can stop now if you want. Hic."

name: Kagami
message: "I won't let you get away with humiliating Tsukasa!"
Jeez... Those three really weren't thinking straight. The alcohol probably had something to do with it, but really, it was the game that was making them act like that.

name: Kagami
message: "I-I did it..."

name: Zakuro
message: "I'll let you two off with the three second rule. You don't have to be stubborn."

name: Kagami+Tsukasa
message: "No, thank you!"

name: Kagami
message: "Ugh, i-it's not embarrassing at all. A-After all, we're all girls..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I feel a little better now that you're naked too."

name: Kagami
message: "Y-Yeah. Anyway, start the next round already."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. We can't back down now."

name: Kagami
message: "Wh-What are you looking at?!"

name: Yuki
message: "N-Nothing. I was thinking that it's kind of weird having just the two of you naked here in the living room."

name: Kagami
message: "Y-You don't have to say it!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "You dummy! W-We're trying not to think about it!"
The two of them suddenly turned beet-red. They almost looked like they were going to cry.

name: Yuki
message: "C-Can we call this whole thing off now?"

name: Kagami
message: "What are you saying? There's no way we can stop now."

name: Tsukasa
message: "We can't stop after coming this far."

name: Kagami
message: "Let's do our best, Tsukasa."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Let's do it!"

name: Yuki
message: "Y-You don't have to try that hard. It's just a game."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yes, we do!"

name: Everyone
message: "Who is the K-I-N-G?"
We all picked our lots.
And the result was...

name: Kagami
message: "I'm the king."

name: Kagami
message: "Well then, I'll give my order to... number three!"
The same strategy. But I couldn't imagine anyone falling for it at this point.
For the record, I held number two, so it had to be Tsukasa or Takashima-san.

name: Kagami
message: "Heheh. Number three is Takashima-san, huh? It shows on your face."

name: Zakuro
message: "No, it doesn't! There's nothing on my face!"

name: Kagami
message: "Just kidding."
As expected of Kagami, she was a much better strategist than Takashima-san.

name: Kagami
message: "That was a bluff. I could tell it wasn't Tsukasa from her face, so I just needed to figure out if it was you or Yuki."

name: Kagami
message: "It didn't show on either of your faces, so I went ahead and said it was you. Doesn't cost me anything to say it."

name: Kagami
message: "If I was wrong, you wouldn't've had that kind of expression. You would've just said 'Huh?' like usual. Even if you try to pretend otherwise, it shows on your face for a moment."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ooh... W-Well done."

name: Kagami
message: "So, number three, please take off all your clothes."

name: Zakuro
message: "A-All right..."
Wait, what the hell is going on here?
Takashima-san's face was red, but she took off her clothes as if it were perfectly natural.
How far did this game have to escalate before they'd be satisfied?

name: Zakuro
message: "I d-did it..."

name: Kagami
message: "Uh... this is kind of..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Your chest is so big. You're making me feel self-conscious."

name: Zakuro
message: "P-Please don't say that."

name: Kagami
message: "But now Takashima-san is naked too, and the next order will be even better."

name: Zakuro
message: "If you get me again, what exactly are you thinking of making me do?"

name: Kagami
message: "You'll see next time it happens."

name: Tsukasa
message: "And Takashima-san, you're..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Since you made me strip, my revenge will be even more embarrassing."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ugh... What do you mean by 'embarrassing'?"

name: Zakuro
message: "What are you imagining, Tsukasa?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hmm... Well, if we get Yuki, I guess we should make her strip too?"

name: Yuki
message: "M-Me too?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah, and if it's Onee-chan, I can make her put her clothes back on. And if it's Takashima-san... Heheh."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I'll have her do something you might see in an eroge."

name: Yuki
message: "E-Eroge?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. There are devilish games that are said to corrupt your mind once you play them. Rumors speak of games where every embarrassing situation imaginable is on display."

name: Yuki
message: "B-But something like that could only exist in some fictional world."

name: Tsukasa
message: "No. Sometimes at night when I get sleepy, I have trouble telling the difference between fantasy and reality... Or when I'm drinking, heheheh."
Y-You shouldn't do that, Tsukasa.

name: Zakuro
message: "Well then, there's no holding back in the next round."

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah, no holding back. After you made us do this, we're going to make you do something really kinky."
She was talking about "kinky" stuff already?

name: Yuki
message: "Well, let's get started..."

name: "Yeah!"
message: Everyone

name: Everyone
message: "Yeah!"

name: Everyone
message: "Yeah!"

name: Everyone
message: We mixed up the lots again.

name: Everyone
message: "Who is the K-I-N-G?"
We pulled our lots, and for the first time...

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Excuse me..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Did you..."

name: Kagami
message: "Yuki is the king?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha. Looks like it."
Normally I'd joke around and say, "I'll have all of your heads!" or something to that effect, but the atmosphere was kind of tense.
I wondered if there was any order I could give that would lighten the mood.

name: Zakuro
message: "Hmm... Even when I was the king, I never got Yuki's number right."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Why are you the one that got to be king?"

name: Kagami
message: "Come on, this is the part where we're supposed to get you, not the other way around."
They were awfully impudent considering they were talking to the king.

name: Yuki
message: "What were you guys going to do if you got my number? Probably something terrible, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Not at all. I was going to ask for a kiss."

name: Kagami
message: "What?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm sure that's not what the other two had in mind, but that's what I wanted to ask for."

name: Kagami
message: "Why do you assume we had something else in mind?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Well then, what were you thinking of?"

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, um... It's not like that was my goal, but... I was just thinking, if that's how it ended up, that might not be bad, either..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "That's right. Now then, your majesty, first of all, please state your order."

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-Why are the rules different for me?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuki, this is the part where one of us was supposed to be the king, so show us that you're fit to rule."

name: Yuki
message: "How am I supposed to do that?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Give the people what they want. If you do that, the public opinion of you will soar."

name: Yuki
message: "Even if I do, it's not like there's one single thing all of you want."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Everyone wants a kiss from you."

name: Yuki
message: "Everyone wants to kiss me..."

name: Yuki
message: "What?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Th-That doesn't make any sense. I mean, Tsukasa, there's no way you want to kiss me, right?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "No. I did think of ordering you to kiss me if I got the chance."

name: Kagami
message: "Ts-Tsukasa..."

name: Yuki
message: "But, Kagami..."

name: Kagami
message: "I-I just said it, didn't I? I wouldn't mind..."
But why?
Why are they all after my lips?
These idiots are drunk. They're acting on their natural impulses. No, this isn't even natural.

name: Yuki
message: "U-Um... we're the same sex, you know?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "We won't make you if you don't want to."
I should decide?
Even though we were all girls?

name: Yuki
message: "A-All right... I'll do it."
I was the king. I should've been the one to decide the order, but for some reason I gave in to their demands.
I was probably drunk too. I wasn't sure, but that was probably it.
If I wasn't, there's no way I would've said yes. Normally, there's no way I'd kiss another girl.

name: Kagami
message: "Uhh."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Sh-She'll do it..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Well then, what number?"
What number? I had no idea who had what number.
What should I do?

name: Yuki
message: "Number one!"

name: Kagami
message: "Huh? U-Uh... Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "Okay, I'll change it."

name: Kagami
message: "What do you mean?!"

name: Yuki
message: "But I mean, you don't really want to do it, right?"

name: Kagami
message: "Why do you think that?!"

name: Yuki
message: "I thought you were just being obstinate like usual."

name: Yuki
message: "It would be a shame to force you to do it if you didn't want to."

name: Kagami
message: "You dummy..."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Kagami
message: "Just now, you gave your order! The order is absolute! Yuki!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
Her naked body pressed up against mine, and just like that...

name: Yuki
message: "Mmpph."
What?
What's happening?

Kagami was kissing me... Hey!
&
Not just that, she was pushing her tongue inside my mouth.

name: Kagami
message: "Pch, haa... Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Mm, hmm?!"
Wh-What? Why?
I was surprised she kissed me, but I was even more surprised by something else.
My heart was beating so fast.
It was like...
Maybe I'm actually...

name: Kagami
message: "I did it."

name: Yuki
message: "Uwhoa."

name: Kagami
message: "It was my first kiss..."

name: Yuki
message: "It was mine too! A-And I lost it to a girl!"

name: Kagami
message: "S-Sorry. Was it unpleasant?"
Kagami looked up at me with tearful eyes.
Wh-Why did she react like that? Kagami wouldn't react like that, would she?
When she looked at me like that...

name: Yuki
message: "Um... it wasn't unpleasant, but..."
I couldn't meet her eyes. I couldn't look straight at her.
I couldn't look at her.
This feeling...
It was like...

name: Tsukasa
message: "I'm so jealous, Onee-chan."

name: Kagami
message: "You really wanted to kiss her too?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Huh? You say that like the rest of us were just joking around."

name: Kagami
message: "Th-That's not what I mean. It's just..."

name: Yuki
message: "Well then, can we call that the last round?"
I don't even know what would have happened if I let them keep playing any further than this.
We were already at the point where I couldn't even look straight at Kagami.

name: Kagami
message: "Y-Yeah, let's..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "It's not fair to quit before the rest of us get a chance."

name: Zakuro
message: "She's right. It's late, and the cold has sobered us up."
Takashima-san started putting her clothes back on.

name: Tsukasa
message: "I guess so. And it's kind of weird to be sitting around naked in the living room."

name: Zakuro
message: "Hehe... Though we kind of got used to that."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I didn't."
Tsukasa started putting her clothes back on too.
I couldn't believe the King Game ended with everyone but me completely naked.
I felt like the game helped me sort out my uncertain feelings.
Though I was still trying my hardest not to think about them.

name: Yuki
message: "Number two!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Huh? R-Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "Wait, you mean..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah, that's me."

name: Yuki
message: "U-Uh, maybe I should change the order."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You shouldn't say mean things like that."

name: Yuki
message: "B-But I mean, it's not like you want to do it either. You just went with the flow, right?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "I said it last night, Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "I'll give up if you say you don't want to, but if you don't mind, it would make me really happy if I could kiss you."

name: Yuki
message: "Y-You mean..."

name: Kagami
message: "The order is final, Yuki."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan..."

name: Kagami
message: "Go ahead, Yuki. Do it."
While I was deliberating, Tsukasa suddenly drew near.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ey!"
Her naked body pressed up against me. Even compared to the other girls, Tsukasa's body was thin and delicate. It felt like I might break her if I wasn't careful.

name: Tsukasa
message: "If you don't want to, just say so."

name: Yuki
message: "Uh, no... It's not that I don't want to, really... b-but... ?!"

Is this really Tsukasa?
&
She suddenly brought her lips to mine.
And Tsukasa was...
Her tongue was pushing at my closed lips. Was she trying to kiss me even more deeply?

name: Yuki
message: "Mm, hmm?!"
I slowly opened my mouth, and her tongue darted in.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Haa... Hmm, hmm..."

name: Yuki
message: "Hhm?"
My mind went numb.
I couldn't believe how good the inside of another girl's mouth felt.
That's all that went through my mind.
It felt so good.

So good that I was hit with an urge to push her to the ground, right here...
&
But of course I couldn't do that.
But I couldn't push her away either.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Mmhaa... haa... Mmm..."
I couldn't have imagined her doing this before tonight. She was lusting after me, thrusting her tongue deep inside my mouth.
Her privates rubbed up against my thigh.
I felt something moist dripping down my leg from the spot she was touching.
At this rate...
If this kept up...
Even if she was drunk, we were standing in front of everyone.

name: Yuki
message: "Wait, y-you're overdoing it."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Huh? Did I do something wrong?"

name: Yuki
message: "N-No, but... Well..."
Tsukasa looked at me.
But I couldn't return her gaze.
My heart was pounding just from looking at her face.

name: Tsukasa
message: "You were my first kiss."
Tsukasa said that with a laugh, but I couldn't believe she could kiss someone so erotically if it was her first time.
My leg was cold. My thigh was still drenched from before.
When I looked closely, Tsukasa's thighs were covered with the same liquid.

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-Why do you look so happy?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Because I enjoyed it. Didn't you?"

name: Yuki
message: "No, it's not that I disliked it. Uh..."

name: Yuki
message: "Well then, can we call that the last round?"
I don't even know what would have happened if I allowed the game to continue.
We were already at the point where I couldn't even look straight at Tsukasa.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Are you fine with that, Onee-chan?"

name: Kagami
message: "I don't mind. It kind of feels like that was the climax."

name: Zakuro
message: "You're right. It's getting late, and the cold has sobered us up a lot."
Takashima-san started putting her clothes back on.

name: Kagami
message: "Even in summer, you'll catch a cold if you run around naked. Come on, Tsukasa, put your clothes back on."
Kagami started getting dressed too.
I couldn't believe the King Game ended with everyone but me completely naked.
I felt like the game helped me sort out my uncertain feelings.
Though I was still trying my hardest not to think about them.

name: Yuki
message: "Number three!"

name: Zakuro
message: "That's me."

name: Kagami
message: "Wha―"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ugh."

name: Zakuro
message: "Well then, excuse me."

name: Yuki
message: "Ah."

name: Zakuro
message: "Mm... smooch."
I closed my eyes.
But there was no need. She just gave me a kiss on the cheek.

name: Yuki
message: "On the ch-cheek?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. Isn't that enough?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, uh... I guess..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Well then, shall we call it a night?"

name: Kagami
message: "You want to end it now?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. I'm sorry. My prank went a little too far. I don't want to know what might happen if we let the game escalate any further."

name: Kagami
message: "You're right. Besides, I think we've all sobered up from the cold. Maybe we overdid it."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha. Maybe we let it escalate a bit too far."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's right. And it's getting late, too."
Takashima-san started putting her clothes back on.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha. It's kind of scary playing with you guys. We got a bit reckless."

name: Kagami
message: "Well, you really shouldn't kiss someone just for the sake of a prank anyway."
Kagami started getting dressed too.
I couldn't believe the King Game ended with everyone but me completely naked.
But I was glad it didn't go any further than that.
I was relieved at that, if nothing else.

name: Yuki
message: "As if I could do something like that!"

name: Yuki
message: "Number one, number two, number three! Put on your clothes!"

name: Kagami
message: "Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "You mean..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Understood. If that is the king's command, we must obey."
Takashima-san started getting dressed.

name: Kagami
message: "Th-That's right. If we can put our clothes back on, that's perfect."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. She's the king, so her word is law."

name: Kagami
message: "That's right. This was just a little prank. You shouldn't kiss someone for something like that. Ahaha."

name: Tsukasa
message: "We kind of got carried away since we were all drunk, but I think the cold is starting to sober us up."
Kagami and Tsukasa started dressing too.

name: Yuki
message: "Let's call it a night, then?"

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah. It's pretty late."

name: Tsukasa
message: "We played a bit too much, didn't we?"
I couldn't believe the King Game ended with everyone but me completely naked.
Though I was glad it didn't go any further than this.
I was relieved at that, if nothing else.
